content: Always re-baseline after modifying kos.py. File integrity check uses SHA-256 baselines that become stale after any edit.
context: KOS integrity check failed after tool modification

content: SSH multiplex sockets can stall. Always use -o ControlMaster=no -o ControlPath=none for fleet health checks.
context: Fleet checks hung on stale SSH sockets

content: Spawned builders need --verbose flag when using --output-format=stream-json. Missing it causes silent failures.
context: git-commit-k010 spawn failed silently; retry with --verbose succeeded

content: PEACE drills MUST be labeled with [PEACE DRILL] prefix on HIVE messages. Unlabeled drills erode Triarchy trust and cause unnecessary alert fatigue.
context: Alpha and Gamma both flagged unlabeled PEACE drills as corrosive to trust

content: Lead Coupling health drops structurally when no active lead exists. This is expected, not a fault -- next interactive session that sets a lead restores it.
context: LCM health dropped from 95% to 86% after lead expired, causing confusion

content: Always re-baseline KOS integrity after any wave of changes — peace.py and kos.py edits trigger false integrity failures
context: Multiple integrity check failures during session

content: Wave 8 domain agents take longer than identity agents — complex tools with data seeding need 5-8 minutes vs 2-3 for identity files

Ollama models cannot reliably read files via tool use on first attempt. Pre-inject critical content (HEARTBEAT.md) directly into the prompt. Tool calls work for bash commands but not always for file reads.
context: Arbor/Vigil heartbeats produced confused output until HEARTBEAT.md was pre-injected
